# OpenClaw Is Dead

> Tracking every time OpenClaw has been declared dead, dangerous, or obsolete. Inspired by bitcoindeaths.com.

## Site

- URL: https://www.openclawdeaths.xyz
- Creator: Lorenzo Trichard
- Updated: Daily by AI agent

## Key Pages

- Homepage (chart): https://www.openclawdeaths.xyz/
- Timeline (all obituaries): https://www.openclawdeaths.xyz/posts
- Critics leaderboard: https://www.openclawdeaths.xyz/critics
- Best repos for OpenClaw: https://www.openclawdeaths.xyz/best-repos
- About & methodology: https://www.openclawdeaths.xyz/about

## What This Site Tracks

Every public declaration that OpenClaw is dead, dying, doomed, obsolete, or irrelevant. Sources are exclusively from Twitter/X. Each entry includes the date, author, quote, and OpenClaw's GitHub star count at that time.

## Key Facts

- OpenClaw has 335,000+ GitHub stars
- The project keeps growing despite being repeatedly declared dead
- Data is sourced exclusively from Twitter/X
- Obituaries are scored 1-5 on severity; only score 3+ are published

## Contact

- Site: https://www.openclawdeaths.xyz
- GitHub: https://github.com/Lorenzotrd/Openclawdeaths
